data.name: Cult Of The Serpent: Cuck Or Be Cucked
data.detailed_description:
A tale of temptation, multiple debauched endings, and a lewd village ritual asking one simple question... Which brings you the greatest pleasure: to cuck, or be cucked?

Although Takahiko Tomikura is happily married to his beautiful wife Manami, he still can't shake the memories of his hometown, its lewd customs, and the dark seed they planted within him. When he finally returns to the village after many years away, he has no idea of the level of the debauchery that lies in store for him and his wife…

Behind its calm country facade, the village of Shironawa hides a dark secret. Each summer, the whole village takes part in Kagachi-sama's Pleasures, a special sexual ritual dedicated to the local god. As an outsider, Manami is soon educated in the local customs, and quickly becomes an active participant in the festivities.

Meanwhile, Takahiko is reunited with his first love, Ayaka. It was the trauma of witnessing his crush participating in the Pleasures that caused him to leave the village, and the memories have haunted him ever since. Now is his chance to regain what was taken from him and assert his dominance within the Tomikura family.

Will Takahiko choose to watch his lovely wife's fall from grace? Or will he seek out the comfort of an older woman? As the darkness within Takahiko grows, the village sinks ever deeper into depravity.

Cult of the Serpent is a tale of corruption that asks one simple question. Which brings the greatest pleasure: to cuck, or be cucked?

  • A classic X-rated visual novel experience with 15+ hours of content.

  • Join in on the lewd customs of the reclusive Shironawa Village.

  • Two beguiling heroines to satisfy the urge to cuck AND be cucked. Watch your wife, Manami, get fucked by other men. Or fuck your experienced one-time crush, Ayaka, behind your father's back.

  • Multiple different debauched endings to discover.

  • Over 25 fully uncensored sex scenes with art by popular Japanese ero artist Minamoto.

  • Fully voice acted in Japanese. Featuring performances by veteran voice actresses Misonoo Mei and Momozono Kaoru.

Manami is a beautiful young woman known throughout the neighborhood for being mature, modest, and steadfast, and is totally in love with her husband, Takahiko. She usually lets him take charge when they’re in the bedroom, but has found herself a little unsatisfied with his vanilla approach. Worried that her husband would think less of her if he knew, she takes care of her urges herself while he’s at work. Lately, though, she’s starting to worry that even this is no longer enough to fully satisfy her.

A few years older than him, Ayaka is Takahiko’s first love, and part of the reason he left the village in the first place. While Takahiko fell utterly in love with her when they were younger, Ayaka also secretly harbored her own fleeting feelings for him. But before Takahiko had the chance to act on his emotions his father, head of the wealthy Tomikura family, took Ayaka as a second wife. He proceeded to use her as his plaything, turning her into the perfect toy for the men of the village to enjoy during the Pleasures.

The men of Shironawa village come in many different shapes and sizes, but they all have one thing in common: their cocks are inhabited by Kagachi-sama, and the god's lust must be sated.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Pentium 3: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1.3 GB 可用空間
